summary: Iteration 113: All new features tested and working. Backend: 17/17 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: BEO Menu Builder, Mixology R&D Lab (55 recipes), and Chef Gio Training with Whisper STT all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Banquet Menu Catalog API correctly seeds Pier 66 menu with 7 sections (BREAKFAST, BREAKS, LUNCH, DINNER, RECEPTION, BEVERAGE, ADD-ONS & SERVICES)
BEO Menu Builder frontend has correct dual-panel layout with category sidebar, available items, selected items, and cost breakdown
Mixology R&D Lab expanded to 55 recipes (45 alcoholic + 10 non-alcoholic) with correct counts verified
Taste search with sliders working - finds cocktails by sweet/sour/bitter profile
Recipe Builder tab allows custom recipe analysis with ABV, chemistry, and costing
Chef Gio Training has 4 modes: full_walkthrough, quiz, scenario, freeform
Whisper STT endpoint /api/chef-gio/transcribe exists and registered (returns 422 without audio file as expected)
Chef Gio Training UI has microphone button in input area for voice-to-text
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
seed_data_creation: Pier 66 banquet menu auto-seeded via POST /api/banquet-menus/seed-pier66
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 113 tested new features: 1) Banquet Menu Catalog API with Pier 66 menu (7 sections, full menu data from PDF), 2) BEO Menu Builder dual-panel UI with click-and-add, cost breakdown, 3) Mixology R&D Lab expanded to 55 recipes (45 alcoholic + 10 non-alcoholic), 4) Chef Gio Whisper STT endpoint at /api/chef-gio/transcribe. All backend APIs working. All frontend panels accessible via CULINARY OPERATIONS sidebar section.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/banquet-menus - returns menu list with Pier 66 - PASSED
GET /api/banquet-menus/bm-pier66-v1/items?section=DINNER&subsection=PLATED DINNER - returns dinner items - PASSED
POST /api/banquet-menus/upload - accepts new menu data - PASSED
GET /api/mixology-rd/recipes - returns 55 recipes (45 alcoholic + 10 non-alcoholic) - PASSED
POST /api/chef-gio/transcribe - endpoint exists (returns 422 without audio) - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: BEO Menu Builder panel opens via CULINARY OPERATIONS sidebar - PASSED
BEO Menu Builder has category sidebar with 7 sections - PASSED
BEO Menu Builder has dual panels (available + selected) - PASSED
BEO Menu Builder has cost breakdown section - PASSED
BEO Menu Builder click-to-add items working - PASSED
BEO Menu Builder cost updates when items selected - PASSED
Mixology R&D Lab panel opens with recipe grid - PASSED
Mixology R&D Lab shows 55 recipes in header - PASSED
Mixology R&D Lab has tabs: Recipe Lab, Taste Search, Recipe Builder, Ingredients, Taste Science - PASSED
Mixology R&D Lab taste search with sliders working - PASSED
Mixology R&D Lab recipe builder tab has analyze button - PASSED
Chef Gio Training panel opens with 4 training modes - PASSED
Chef Gio Training has microphone button in input area - PASSED
Chef Gio Training has chat input and send button - PASSED
Chef Gio Training session history visible - PASSED

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. Banquet menu data is seeded from PDF extraction. Mixology recipes are hardcoded in RECIPE_DB. Chef Gio uses Emergent LLM for AI responses.
